headline: NTRS to Exit Guardianship Business With WTFC Deal in Strategic Pivot
summary: Northern Trust agrees to sell its guardianship services unit to Wintrust, streamlining operations and sharpening focus on core wealth and asset management businesses.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Northern Trust, Raises Price Target to $200
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Ebrahim Poonawala   maintains Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) with a Buy and raises the price target from $190 to $200.
